raw_consumer_statement: XX/XX/2024 I noticed a bill show up in my online access for my banking card. When I looked closer it was for Macys. The bill was over {$300.00}. I never made a purchase that large so I called toll free number and was told the purchase was mailed to an address in XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX and would never have a purchase sent anywhere other than my home. At that point they opened a fraud investigation. In XXXX I returned a call per Macys credit card to explain why I was filing/disputing this charge. In XX/XX/2024 I received a letter stating that I didnt prove the purchase wasnt made by me and that I was now responsible for full payment. I did not make or authorize any purchases that were sent anywhere than my home address. Ive never had a history of going such things with this Macys store card. I should not have to pay for something that I didnt purchase or authorize.
